name: Skillet Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp. Remove the bacon and set it aside, reserving one tablespoon of drippings in the skillet.
2. Crumble the bacon and add it back to the skillet.
3. Sauté the squash and onion in the reserved drippings for 6 minutes or until they are tender. Stir in the sour cream and seasonings.
4. Transfer the mixture into a serving dish and sprinkle with crumbled bacon.
